<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Explain the shortest describe-edge path from `from` to `to`.

This is the rich companion to `Graph.describe({ explain })`: it reports found/no-path
status and per-hop metadata, but remains a pure helper over the snapshot.

## Import

```ts
import { explainPath } from "@graphrefly/ts/graph";
```

## Signature

```ts
function explainPath(
	snapshot: DescribeSnapshot,
	from: string,
	to: string,
	options: ExplainPathOptions = {},
): CausalChain
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `snapshot` | `DescribeSnapshot` | Missing @param snapshot JSDoc. |
| `from` | `string` | Missing @param from JSDoc. |
| `to` | `string` | Missing @param to JSDoc. |
| `options` | `ExplainPathOptions` | Missing @param options JSDoc. |

## Returns

`CausalChain`
